title: Vanilla Bliss
description: A simple client-side modpack with a delightful blend of optimizations, shaders, and quality of life mods to make your next vanilla playthrough even sweeter.
body:
# Its vanilla, but better!

Vanilla Bliss is a collection of optimizations, shaders, and quality-of-life mods that make playing vanilla Minecraft a delight. 

## Realms safe

These mods are client-side only and work with unmodded realms servers so you can keep playing in your favorite online experiences.

## Easy to add-to

This modpack focuses only on a few essential mods making it easy to customize with your favorite modpacks. 


## Details
This modpack incorporates a few mods:

- Sodium
- Iris Shaders
- Complimentary Shaders
- Bobby
- BetterF3
- Freecam
- Zoomify
- Shulker Box Tooltips
- Better Animations
